sections.subtitle: Team Form
sections.text: Real Sociedad are in strong form, remaining unbeaten in their last 9 matches with recent results including a 3-2 win over Deportivo Alavés and a 3-1 victory against Celta Vigo. Elche, on the other hand, are struggling, winless in their last 6 games, with losses to Barcelona (1-3) and Levante (3-2) highlighting defensive frailties. Sociedad’s consistent scoring and resilience give them an edge.

sections.subtitle: Head-to-Head Record
sections.text: In their last two head-to-head encounters, Real Sociedad have dominated Elche, with a 2-0 win in 2023 and a 1-1 draw earlier this season. Sociedad have not lost to Elche in their last 7 meetings, often scoring first, which suggests a psychological advantage for the hosts.

sections.subtitle: Key Players
sections.text: Mikel Oyarzabal (7.52 avg. rating, 4 goals in last 5) and Gonçalo Guedes (7.48 avg. rating, 3 goals) are in excellent form for Real Sociedad, posing a significant threat upfront. Elche will rely on Álvaro Rodriguez (5 goals, 4 assists) to exploit any defensive lapses, though their lack of in-form players from recent matches is a concern.

sections.subtitle: Season Statistics
sections.text: Real Sociedad rank 6th in goals scored (30) and big chances created (57), showcasing their attacking prowess, though their defense (11th in goals conceded) remains vulnerable. Elche, with similar goals scored (30), struggle defensively too, conceding 32 goals, and their inability to secure clean sheets (6 games without) could be exploited by Sociedad’s attackers.

sections.subtitle: Match Outlook
sections.text: Given Sociedad’s unbeaten streak, home advantage at Reale Arena, and historical dominance over Elche, they are favorites to win, aligning with Sofascore’s 47% home win probability. Elche’s poor away form and defensive issues make an upset unlikely, though both teams’ tendency to concede suggests goals on both sides.

halftimeSections.subtitle: First half overview
halftimeSections.text: The first half at Reale Arena saw an engaging contest between Real Sociedad and Elche, ending with a scoreline of 2-1 in favor of the home side. Real Sociedad took the lead with well-taken goals, showing clinical finishing despite having less possession. Elche, on the other hand, responded with a goal of their own, ensuring they remain in the game at the break. Both teams displayed moments of quality, with Real Sociedad capitalizing on their opportunities while Elche dominated the ball for significant periods.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Team performance and possession
halftimeSections.text: Elche controlled the majority of possession in the first half, frequently dictating the tempo of the game. Their higher ball retention allowed them to create more entries into the final third and penalty area compared to Real Sociedad. However, Real Sociedad made the most of their limited possession, converting their chances efficiently. The home side showed a balanced approach in duels, matching Elche in overall competitiveness, though their aerial presence was slightly more effective.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Attacking momentum and key moments
halftimeSections.text: The first half began with Elche asserting early dominance, pushing forward with consistent attacking intent for a prolonged period. Real Sociedad struggled to gain a foothold initially but started to build momentum as the half progressed, especially around key moments leading to their goals. Elche maintained pressure with frequent attacking spells, particularly in the latter stages of the half, while Real Sociedad showcased dangerous bursts of energy that shifted the momentum in their favor at critical times.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Defensive solidity and discipline
halftimeSections.text: Defensively, Real Sociedad held firm despite Elche's greater territorial advantage, managing to limit the away side to fewer clear-cut opportunities than their possession might suggest. Elche's backline, however, showed vulnerabilities, conceding twice despite their control of the game. Disciplinary issues also crept in for Elche, with a couple of yellow cards indicating some frustration and overzealous challenges. Real Sociedad, in contrast, maintained a clean sheet in terms of bookings, focusing on structured defending.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Key players and individual contributions
halftimeSections.text: For Real Sociedad, Mikel Oyarzabal stood out with a crucial goal, demonstrating his importance in the attacking third with composure and sharpness. Luka Sučić also made a significant impact, finding the back of the net and contributing to the home side’s threat. On the Elche side, André Silva was a standout performer, scoring their lone goal and posing a constant danger with his movement and finishing. Both teams will rely on these key figures to influence the outcome in the second half.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Second half expectations
halftimeSections.text: Looking ahead to the second half, Real Sociedad will likely aim to exploit counter-attacking opportunities, leveraging their clinical finishing to extend their lead. Elche, with their possession-based style, are expected to continue pushing for an equalizer, potentially exposing themselves to quick transitions from the hosts. The game remains finely poised, and tactical adjustments could play a pivotal role. Real Sociedad might look to tighten up in midfield to disrupt Elche’s rhythm, while Elche could focus on creating clearer chances from their dominance.
